scripts.build:desktop:mac: npm run desktop:prepare && tauri build --bundles app,dmg
scripts.build:desktop:win: npm run desktop:prepare && tauri build --bundles msi,nsis
scripts.mobile:ipad: npm run mobile:sync && cap open ios
scripts.verify:macos: node ./scripts/release-lane.mjs require macos && npm run doctor:macos && npm run typecheck && npm run test:timeline && npm run build:desktop:mac && node ./scripts/release-lane.mjs mark macos
scripts.verify:ipados: node ./scripts/release-lane.mjs require ipados && npm run doctor:ipados && npm run typecheck && npm run test:timeline && npm run mobile:sync && node ./scripts/release-lane.mjs mark ipados
scripts.verify:windows: node ./scripts/release-lane.mjs require windows && npm run doctor:windows && npm run typecheck && npm run test:timeline && npm run build:desktop:win && node ./scripts/release-lane.mjs mark windows
